title: Brew & Co — Café Brand Identity
description: Complete brand identity for a specialty coffee shop. Logo, color system, packaging mockups, menu, and a full 30-piece Instagram kit.

title: Neon Gym — Social Media Kit
description: Full content system for a fitness brand. 30+ templates across feed posts, stories, highlight covers, and reel cover art.

title: Type Poster Series — Motion & Stillness
description: 3-piece typographic poster series exploring duality through experimental typography, negative space, and grain texture.

title: Minimal Icon System — 40 Icons
description: Custom 40-icon set in a consistent minimal stroke style. Built for a dark-theme web app. All icons available as SVG and Figma components.
